tags.name: `mc-step-indicator-item`
tags.description:
Purpose: A component for displaying a step indicator for a process or workflow.
Category: Forms, Navigation
When to use: When you need to visually represent the progress of a multi-step process.
When not to use: For single-step processes or when a simple progress bar suffices.
Works with components: mc-step-indicator
Alternative component names: Step Progress Indicator, Stepper, Progress Tracker

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the `step-indicator-item`. Used to display custom text/icon.

  * `icon` {} - The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

Attributes:

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `alignitemsdisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit | "x-large"`} - 

  * `icon` {`string`} - 

  * `label` {`string`} - 

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - 

  * `state` {`State`} - 

  * `appearance` {`Appearance`} - 

Properties:

  * `hasSlotIcon` {`boolean`} - 

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `alignitemsdisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit | "x-large"`} - 

  * `icon` {`string`} - 

  * `label` {`string`} - 

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - 

  * `state` {`State`} - 

  * `appearance` {`Appearance`} - 

  * `iconSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} -
